query:
-- Tabella fatture importate
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS invoices (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  supplierId VARCHAR(36),
  supplierName VARCHAR(255),
  invoiceNumber VARCHAR(100),
  invoiceDate DATE,
  totalAmount DECIMAL(10,2),
  fileUrl TEXT NOT NULL,
  extractedText TEXT,
  extractedData JSON,
  status ENUM('pending', 'matched', 'confirmed', 'archived') DEFAULT 'pending',
  uploadedBy INT NOT NULL,
  uploadedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  processedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  confirmedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  INDEX idx_status (status),
  INDEX idx_uploaded_by (uploadedBy),
  INDEX idx_supplier (supplierId)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Tabella righe fattura con abbinamenti
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS invoice_items (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  invoiceId VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  productName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  quantity DECIMAL(10,3) NOT NULL,
  unit VARCHAR(20),
  unitPrice DECIMAL(10,2),
  totalPrice DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  ingredientId VARCHAR(36),
  matchConfidence DECIMAL(5,2),
  matchMethod ENUM('auto', 'manual', 'learned'),
  isConfirmed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  oldPrice DECIMAL(10,2),
  newPrice DECIMAL(10,2),
  priceChange DECIMAL(5,2),
  isAnomalous BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  confirmedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  confirmedBy INT,
  INDEX idx_invoice (invoiceId),
  INDEX idx_ingredient (ingredientId),
  INDEX idx_confirmed (isConfirmed)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Tabella memoria abbinamenti (apprendimento)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS product_mappings (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  supplierId VARCHAR(36),
  supplierName VARCHAR(255),
  productNameInInvoice VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  productNameNormalized VARCHAR(255),
  brandInInvoice VARCHAR(255),
  ingredientId VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  ingredientName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  timesUsed INT DEFAULT 1,
  lastUsedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  createdBy INT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_supplier_product (supplierId, productNameNormalized),
  INDEX idx_product_normalized (productNameNormalized),
  INDEX idx_ingredient (ingredientId),
  UNIQUE KEY unique_mapping (supplierId, productNameNormalized, ingredientId)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Tabella storico variazioni prezzi
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS price_history (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  ingredientId VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  ingredientName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  oldPackagePrice DECIMAL(10,2),
  newPackagePrice DECIMAL(10,2),
  oldPricePerUnit DECIMAL(10,2),
  newPricePerUnit DECIMAL(10,2),
  priceChange DECIMAL(5,2),
  invoiceId VARCHAR(36),
  invoiceItemId VARCHAR(36),
  supplierId VARCHAR(36),
  changeReason ENUM('invoice', 'manual', 'bulk_update') DEFAULT 'invoice',
  isAnomalous BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  changedBy INT NOT NULL,
  changedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  notes TEXT,
  INDEX idx_ingredient_date (ingredientId, changedAt),
  INDEX idx_anomalous (isAnomalous, changedAt),
  INDEX idx_invoice (invoiceId)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
